
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(sf)
library(tigris)
library(tidyverse)
library(patchwork)
library(broom)
library(forcats)
library(ggrepel)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(lubridate)
library(ggside)       # required: geom_ysidedensity for S1

options(tigris_use_cache = TRUE)


# ==========================================================
# SHARED THEME FOR PLOTS
# ==========================================================

theme_tri <- function(base_size = 11) {
  theme_minimal(base_size = base_size) +
    theme(
      plot.title       = element_text(face = "bold", size = base_size + 2,
                                      margin = margin(b = 5)),
      plot.subtitle    = element_text(color = "grey35", size = base_size - 0.5,
                                      margin = margin(b = 8)),
      plot.caption     = element_text(color = "grey55", size = base_size - 2,
                                      hjust = 0, margin = margin(t = 8)),
      axis.title       = element_text(size = base_size - 0.5, color = "grey20"),
      axis.text        = element_text(size = base_size - 1),
      panel.grid.major = element_line(color = "grey92"),
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
      legend.key.size  = unit(0.85, "lines"),
      strip.text       = element_text(face = "bold"),
      plot.margin      = margin(12, 14, 10, 12)
    )
}


# ==========================================================
# 2) PATHS
# ==========================================================

tri_path <- "~/Desktop/SPRING2026/EC 242/Project #2"
out_path <- file.path(tri_path, "outputs")
dir.create(out_path, showWarnings = FALSE)


# ==========================================================
# 3) IMPORT ALL YEARLY FILES
# ==========================================================

tri_files <- list.files(
  path       = tri_path,
  pattern    = "^[0-9]{4}_us\\.csv$",
  full.names = TRUE
)

cat("Files found:", length(tri_files), "\n")

tri_raw <- tri_files %>%
  set_names() %>%
  map_dfr(
    ~ read_csv(.x, col_types = cols(.default = "c"), show_col_types = FALSE),
    .id = "source_file"
  ) %>%
  mutate(year = as.integer(str_extract(basename(source_file), "\\d{4}")))

cat("Total rows (facility x chemical x year):", nrow(tri_raw), "\n")
cat("Years found:", paste(sort(unique(tri_raw$year)), collapse = ", "), "\n")


# ==========================================================
# 4) STANDARDISE COLUMN NAMES
# ==========================================================

names(tri_raw) <- names(tri_raw) %>%
  str_to_lower() %>%
  str_replace_all("[^a-z0-9]+", "_") %>%
  str_replace_all("^_|_$", "")

names(tri_raw) <- ifelse(
  str_detect(names(tri_raw), "^[0-9]"),
  paste0("x", names(tri_raw)),
  names(tri_raw)
)

cat("\nColumn names (first 25):\n")
print(names(tri_raw)[1:25])


# ==========================================================
# 5) EXTRACT COLUMNS
# ==========================================================

tri_long <- tri_raw %>%
  transmute(
    year,
    trifd            = x2_trifd,
    facility_name    = x4_facility_name,
    city             = x6_city,
    county           = x7_county,
    st               = str_trim(x8_st),
    latitude         = as.numeric(x12_latitude),
    longitude        = as.numeric(x13_longitude),
    industry_sector  = str_trim(x23_industry_sector),
    primary_naics    = x30_primary_naics,
    chemical         = x37_chemical,
    classification   = x43_classification,
    fugitive_air     = as.numeric(x51_5_1_fugitive_air),
    stack_air        = as.numeric(x52_5_2_stack_air),
    water_release    = as.numeric(x53_5_3_water),
    underground      = as.numeric(x54_5_4_underground),
    landfills        = as.numeric(x57_5_5_1_landfills),
    land_treatment   = as.numeric(x60_5_5_2_land_treatment),
    surface_imp      = as.numeric(x61_5_5_3_surface_impndmnt),
    other_disposal   = as.numeric(x64_5_5_4_other_disposal),
    on_site_total    = as.numeric(x65_on_site_release_total),
    off_site_total   = as.numeric(x88_off_site_release_total),
    total_releases   = as.numeric(x107_total_releases),
    production_waste = as.numeric(x119_production_wste_8_1_8_7),
    production_ratio = as.numeric(x122_8_9_production_ratio)
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    on_site_calc = rowSums(
      cbind(fugitive_air, stack_air, water_release, underground,
            landfills, land_treatment, surface_imp, other_disposal),
      na.rm = TRUE
    ),
    on_site     = coalesce(on_site_total, on_site_calc),
    air_release = rowSums(cbind(fugitive_air, stack_air), na.rm = TRUE),
    land_release= rowSums(cbind(landfills, land_treatment,
                                surface_imp, other_disposal), na.rm = TRUE),
    naics2      = substr(primary_naics, 1, 2),
    has_coords  = !is.na(latitude) & !is.na(longitude) &
      longitude >= -125 & longitude <= -66 &
      latitude  >= 24   & latitude  <= 50
  )

cat("Long-form rows:", nrow(tri_long), "\n")


# ==========================================================
# 6) COLLAPSE TO FACILITY-YEAR LEVEL
# ==========================================================

facility_year <- tri_long %>%
  filter(!is.na(st), st != "", !is.na(year)) %>%
  group_by(trifd, facility_name, city, county, st,
           latitude, longitude, has_coords,
           industry_sector, primary_naics, naics2, year) %>%
  summarise(
    on_site       = sum(on_site,       na.rm = TRUE),
    off_site      = sum(off_site_total,na.rm = TRUE),
    air_release   = sum(air_release,   na.rm = TRUE),
    water_release = sum(water_release, na.rm = TRUE),
    land_release  = sum(land_release,  na.rm = TRUE),
    n_chemicals   = n_distinct(chemical),
    production_waste = production_waste[!is.na(production_waste)][1],
    production_ratio = production_ratio[!is.na(production_ratio)][1],
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    toxic_intensity = if_else(
      !is.na(production_waste) & production_waste > 0,
      on_site / production_waste,
      NA_real_
    ),
    log_on_site         = log1p(on_site),
    log_toxic_intensity = log1p(toxic_intensity)
  )

cat("Facility-year rows:", nrow(facility_year), "\n")
cat("Unique facilities:", n_distinct(facility_year$trifd), "\n")
print(summary(facility_year$on_site))
print(summary(facility_year$toxic_intensity))


# ==========================================================
# 7) CLEAN WORKING DATASETS
# ==========================================================

fac_all <- facility_year %>%
  filter(on_site >= 0,
         !st %in% c("PR", "VI", "GU", "MP", "AS"))

fac <- facility_year %>%
  filter(on_site >= 0,
         !st %in% c("AK", "HI", "PR", "VI", "GU", "MP", "AS"))

fac_ti <- fac %>%
  filter(!is.na(toxic_intensity),
         is.finite(log_toxic_intensity),
         !is.na(industry_sector),
         industry_sector != "")

cat("\nFull dataset (fac, contiguous 48):", nrow(fac), "rows\n")
cat("Toxic intensity subset (fac_ti):", nrow(fac_ti), "rows\n")


# ----------------------------------------------------------
# PLOT M0: Alaska outlier diagnostic
# ----------------------------------------------------------

state_all <- fac_all %>%
  group_by(st) %>%
  summarise(
    on_site    = sum(on_site, na.rm = TRUE),
    facilities = n_distinct(trifd),
    .groups    = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(on_site)) %>%
  mutate(
    share  = on_site / sum(on_site),
    rank   = row_number(),
    is_ak  = st == "AK",
    label  = if_else(rank <= 5 | st == "AK", st, NA_character_)
  )

ak_row     <- state_all %>% filter(st == "AK")
ak_x_pos   <- nrow(state_all %>% filter(rank <= 20))
ak_bar_end <- ak_row$on_site / 1e9
ak_share   <- round(ak_row$share * 100, 1)

p_M0_outlier <- state_all %>%
  slice_head(n = 20) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = reorder(st, on_site),
             y = on_site / 1e9,
             fill = is_ak)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.72) +
  geom_text(
    aes(label = if_else(!is.na(label),
                        paste0(round(share * 100, 1), "%"), "")),
    hjust = -0.1, size = 3, color = "grey25"
  ) +
  annotate("text",
           x     = ak_x_pos,
           y     = ak_bar_end * 0.55,
           label = paste0(
             "Red Dog Mine (AK)\n",
             "Zinc/lead tailings reported\n",
             "in pounds -- not comparable\n",
             "to manufacturing releases.\n",
             "Excluded from main analysis."
           ),
           hjust = 0, vjust = 0.5,
           size = 3, color = "white", fontface = "bold"
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c("TRUE" = "#d73027", "FALSE" = "steelblue"),
    guide  = "none"
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.18)),
    labels = function(x) paste0(round(x, 1), "B lbs")
  ) +
  coord_flip(clip = "off") +
  labs(
    title    = "Alaska is a structural outlier: one mine dominates the national total",
    subtitle = paste0(
      "Top 20 states including AK  |  Red bar = AK (", ak_share,
      "% of U.S. total)  |  Excluded from all subsequent analysis"
    ),
    x        = NULL,
    y        = "Cumulative on-site releases 2000-2024 (billion lbs)",
    caption  = paste0(
      "AK's Red Dog Mine reports inert waste rock tailings in pounds -- categorically\n",
      "different from chemical releases into air, water, or land at other facilities.\n",
      "EPA national analyses routinely treat hard-rock mining separately for this reason.\n",
      "Source: EPA TRI Basic Data Files, 2000-2024"
    )
  ) +
  theme_tri()

p_M0_outlier
